consensus_variance.line_item: Memory-cycle position / normalized earnings power (peak-cycle de-rate)
consensus_variance.narrative: Consensus rates MU 89% Buy on ~16.7x FY2026E peak EPS, capitalizing peak memory earnings. Our load-bearing downward variance marks FY2026 EPS as a multi-sigma peak (75% GM vs ~25-30% mid-cycle; FY2023 was -$5.34), normalized EPS at ~$40-48 -> through-cycle fair value ~$552, and P/B ~6.5x ABOVE the historical PEAK (~3x). Even the consensus PT ($829) is -17% below spot; our PT-implied (-29.5%) is ~13pp below that. Two-tailed on TIMING (cycle still rising; HBM structurally better) -> Strong Sell sized as Underweight. Sizing = 30 x 65 x 20 / 10000 = 3.9.

evidence_refs.ref: MU 10-K: FY2023 EPS -$5.34 (negative GM) vs FY2026E ~$60; FY2026 capex >$25B fixed

Consensus PT $828.73 (-17% below spot); P/B ~6.5x vs peak ~3x; mid-cycle EPS $30-40 (Wells Fargo)

revision_velocity.breadth_note: Estimates revised sharply UP; 30 SB/9 B/4 H/1 SS. BUT the average PT ($828.73) is BELOW spot ($996) - revisions chase the parabolic price.
revision_velocity.pt_revisions_recent: Avg PT ~$829 (low $249 / high $1,750); median ~17% below spot.
revision_velocity.pre_print_drift: Stock +770-910% over 1yr to 52-wk high $1,089; IV ~100%; Q3 FY26 reports 2026-06-24.
revision_velocity.peer_comparison: MU at a PREMIUM to SK Hynix (HBM leader) on P/E and P/B despite being #2.
revision_velocity.verdict: Estimates rising but average PT below spot - late-cycle/parabolic. Caution is peak-cycle valuation + mid-cycle EPS gap; timing tail real -> Strong Sell sized as Underweight.
